form.label: SDA Firewall NOC — FTDv (SDA-ACP)
form.description: Live NGFW telemetry from the fabric FTDv (index=network). Connection begin events (%FTD-*-430002) drive allow/deny + identity (ISE user, TrustSec SGT) + access-rule panels; connection end events (430003) carry application + TLS-decryption detail. SD-Access ISE Integration lab.

search.query: index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" | rex "AccessControlRuleAction: (?<action>\w+)" | timechart span=10m count by action
index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" | rex "AccessControlRuleAction: (?<action>\w+)" | stats count by action

index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" | rex "DstIP: (?<dst>[^,]+)" | rex "DstPort: (?<dport>\d+)" | rex "AccessControlRuleAction: (?<action>\w+)" | eval dest=dst.":".dport | stats count values(action) as action by dest | sort -count | head 10
index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" | rex "SourceSecurityGroup: (?<sgt>[^,]+)" | search sgt=* | stats count by sgt
index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430003" | rex "ApplicationProtocol: (?<app>[^,]+)" | search app=* | top limit=8 app
index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" | rex "AccessControlRuleName: (?<rule>[^,]+)" | rex "AccessControlRuleAction: (?<action>\w+)" | stats count by rule action | sort -count

index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430002" "AccessControlRuleAction: Block" | rex "SrcIP: (?<src>[^,]+)" | rex "DstIP: (?<dst>[^,]+)" | rex "DstPort: (?<dport>\d+)" | rex "AccessControlRuleName: (?<rule>[^,]+)" | rex "User: (?<user>[^,]+)" | eval user=coalesce(user,"-") | table _time user src dst dport rule | sort -_time | head 20

panel.title: TLS decryption detail (SSL policy / rule / version / action)

search.query: index=network host=198.18.128.82 "%FTD-6-430003" "SSLActualAction" | rex "DstIP: (?<dst>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLPolicy: (?<sslpolicy>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLRuleName: (?<sslrule>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLActualAction: (?<sslaction>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLVersion: (?<sslver>[^,]+)" | rex "SSLFlowStatus: (?<sslstatus>[^,]+)" | stats count by dst sslpolicy sslrule sslaction sslver sslstatus | sort -count
